nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cuban vireo
nodes.summary: Cuban vireo（Cuban vireo，学名 Vireo gundlachii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于常綠森林，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: orientalis" southeastern Cuba The Cuban vireo primarily inhabits the edges of evergreen and deciduous forest, brushlands, thickets, and scrublands from sea level up to about but also occurs higher

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: orientalis" southeastern Cuba The Cuban vireo primarily inhabits the edges of evergreen and deciduous forest, brushlands, thickets, and scrublands from sea level up to about but also occurs higher
